meta.note: Assembled Romanian KG fixture for offline play + tests. Built from 8 authored per-category subgraphs (istorie, literatura, geografie, personalitati, arta_cultura, stiinta, societate, limba) merged + deduped by canonical_name, with cross-category bridge edges, then puzzles generated by romania_scraper.kg.puzzles.generate_puzzles (BFS shortest path on the non-distractor subgraph). The original v1 seed nodes/edges/5 puzzles are preserved verbatim. Node ids are readable slugs. Field shapes conform to KG_CONTRACT.md v1: easy optimal_hops in [2,3], hard in [4,7], par==optimal_hops, hint_neighbors==solution_path[1:]; solution paths are shortest on the non-distractor subgraph; difficulty_tier from salience bands.

kg_nodes.label_ro: Ansamblul monumental de la Targu Jiu
kg_nodes.description: Ansamblul sculptural creat de Brancusi la Targu Jiu.
Domeniu al artelor vizuale: pictura, sculptura, grafica.

Inginer si inventator roman, fondatorul teoriei sonicitatii.
Inginer si inventator roman, pionier al aviatiei cu reactie.

Stiinta care studiaza microorganismele.
